name: Ponto Nei
description:
Ponto Nei (先斗寧) is a female Japanese Virtual YouTuber affiliated with NIJISANJI, debuting as part of the unit "Ranunculus" (ラナンキュラス) alongside Umise Yotsuha and Amagase Muyu. Previously, she was enrolled as a student in VIRTUAL TALENT ACADEMY (VTA) as part of its first generation.
